form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (21.77) in a NG, finishing a 3 length second. Yet to miss the frame from four starts from the draw, including two wins. Has ability and looks a key chance.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 12 lengths behind Exit Mode over 375m. Not keen this time.

form.formComment: Had a winning run broken last start when third over 375m at this track. Has plenty of ability rates highly on best form. Must include.

form.formComment: Impressive performance to post a big 5.5 lengths victory in a Grade 3/4 last start at this track, clocking a solid 21.84 over the 375m trip. In form and worth thought again.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 3 lengths at this track over 375m (21.55) beating Del Mar Jessie in NG on April 12. Must be a winning chance again.
